description: MCP server for Mireye Earth — federal-source-cited geospatial data for any MCP-aware agent.
name: com.mireye/earth

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Mireye API. Defaults to https://api.mireye.com. Stored login credentials only attach when created against this same URL.
environmentVariables.name: MIREYE_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Mireye API bearer token. Optional alternative to `mireye-mcp login` for non-interactive hosts.
environmentVariables.name: MIREYE_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60.
environmentVariables.name: MIREYE_TIMEOUT_S

environmentVariables.description: Path to the credentials file written by `mireye-mcp login`. Defaults to ~/.config/mireye-mcp/credentials.json.
environmentVariables.name: MIREYE_MCP_CREDENTIALS_FILE
